response: To cut out sugar, start by reading food labels and avoiding [product] with added sugars. Replace sugary snacks with [healthy alternative] like fruits or nuts. Limit drinks like soda and opt for water or herbal tea. Gradually reduce sugar in coffee or tea. Be mindful of hidden sugars in sauces and dressings. Track your intake with a journal or app. Stay consistent and seek support from [friend or family member].
